per_item.question: Which Colorectal trials had 3 or more arms and used a multikinase inhibitor as a control?
per_item.pred_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Trial name", "Year", "Number of arms", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Type of control" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Type of control" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';
per_item.gt_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Number of arms", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal' AND "Number of arms" >= 3 AND "Control arm" = 'Multikinase inhibitor';

per_item.question: Find clinical trials for renal cell cancer that used nivolumab in combination with other treatments?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Treatment regimen", "Monotherapy/combination"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell'
  AND "Treatment regimen" = 'Nivolumab'
  AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Renal cell' AND "Name of ICI" = 'Nivolumab' AND "Monotherapy/combination" = 'Combination';

SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Control arm", "Cancer type", "Control regimen", "Trial phase"
FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Esophageal/GEJ' AND "Control arm" = 'Chemo';

per_item.question: Which clinical trials tested Nivolumab and Ipilimumab for Non-Small Cell Lung Cancer and used Chemoradio as the control, excluding trials where the control arm was simply chemotherapy?

  AND "Type of control" = 'Chemoradio' 
  AND "Control arm" != 'Chemotherapy';

per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Trial phase" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Melanoma' AND "Class of ICI" = 'PD-L1' AND "Year" >= 2018;

per_item.question: Show studies of colorectal cancer included in the meta-analysis that used PD-L1 or CTLA-4 agents?
per_item.pred_sql:
SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI", "Class of ICI", "Included in MA"
FROM clinical_trials
WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal'
  AND "Included in MA" = 'Yes'
  AND (("Name of ICI" IN ('Atezolizumab', 'Durvalumab', 'Nivolumab', 'Pembrolizumab')) OR ("Class of ICI" IN ('CTLA-4', 'PD-L1', 'PD-L1, CTLA-4')));
per_item.gt_sql: SELECT "NCT", "Author", "Year", "Originial publication or Follow-up", "Included in MA", "Class of ICI", "Cancer type", "Name of ICI" FROM clinical_trials WHERE "Cancer type" = 'Colorectal';
